title: CSPL Early Warning Signs report: responses to open consultation
body: "The Committee on Standards in Public Life has published the written submissions received in response to an open consultation held as part of its review into accountability in public life.  The open consultation ran from 25 March 2024 to 14 June 2024.  ‘Recognising and Responding to Early Warning Signs in Public Sector Bodies’ is the Committee’s report of its review into accountability in public life. "
